description:
The 5 marla modern house project in DHA Rahbar was designed to offer a stylish and practical living space for modern families. Real Enterprises carefully planned the project to maximize functionality, comfort, and aesthetics within a compact layout.

The house features a contemporary exterior elevation, well-designed bedrooms with attached bathrooms, a modern kitchen, spacious living areas, and premium finishing throughout. Large windows and open spaces were incorporated to enhance natural lighting and ventilation, creating a bright and welcoming environment.

Special attention was given to smart space utilization, elegant ceiling designs, modern flooring, and a sleek front façade to give the home a premium look despite its smaller footprint. Every detail was executed with precision to ensure both durability and long-term value.

This project reflects Real Enterprises’ expertise in delivering modern and beautifully designed homes in premium communities like DHA Rahbar.
